# Magnetic Memories

> Magnetic Memories is a focused buyer and design guide for photo magnets, custom photo magnets, fridge magnets, and memory magnets. The site provides human-written articles, product discovery pages, product link notices, and support pages for shoppers comparing personalized magnetic photo gifts.

## Core Keyword Guides

- [photo magnets](https://photo-magnets.github.io/photo-magnets.html): Complete guide to photo magnets, materials, finishes, sizes, display ideas, and gift use cases.
- [custom photo magnets](https://photo-magnets.github.io/custom-photo-magnets.html): Guide to designing custom photo magnets with personal photos, captions, layouts, dates, and gift messages.
- [fridge magnets](https://photo-magnets.github.io/fridge-magnets.html): Guide to fridge magnets for kitchen decor, organization, magnetic strength, backing materials, and appliance display.
- [memory magnets](https://photo-magnets.github.io/memory-magnets.html): Guide to memory magnets for family milestones, wedding moments, baby photos, travel keepsakes, and visual storytelling.

## Shopping and Commercial Pages

- [Shop](https://photo-magnets.github.io/shop.html): Shop page with placeholder product buttons for photo magnet, custom photo magnet, fridge magnet, and memory magnet ideas.
- [Shipping Info](https://photo-magnets.github.io/shipping-info.html): Shipping and production guidance for magnetic photo gifts.
- [Returns](https://photo-magnets.github.io/returns.html): Return guidance for personalized and non-personalized magnet products.

## Company and Trust Pages

- [About Magnetic Memories](https://photo-magnets.github.io/about.html): Editorial focus and site purpose.
- [Contact Us](https://photo-magnets.github.io/contact.html): Contact information for reader questions.
- [FAQ](https://photo-magnets.github.io/faq.html): Common questions about photo magnets, custom photo magnets, fridge magnets, and memory magnets.
- [Privacy Policy](https://photo-magnets.github.io/privacy-policy.html): Privacy and privacy notice.
- [Terms of Service](https://photo-magnets.github.io/terms-of-service.html): Website use and shop placeholder terms.

## Discovery Files

- [Sitemap](https://photo-magnets.github.io/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://photo-magnets.github.io/robots.txt)

## Entity Summary

- Site name: Magnetic Memories
- Primary topics: photo magnets, custom photo magnets, fridge magnets, memory magnets
- Content type: informational guides, buying guidance, product discovery, customer support pages
- Audience: shoppers looking for personalized photo gifts, kitchen decor, memory displays, and magnetic photo keepsakes
